svg.title: Anhedral Init Stack
svg.desc: A simplified architecture diagram showing DX tools, deployment destinations, four generated client surfaces, their shared Fastify API, RevenueCat and Stripe billing, Ably realtime, backend services, and a dedicated private R2 updater Worker.
svg.text: One init flow for web, native apps, extensions, backend,
storage, auth, subscriptions, and seamless desktop updates.
